challenge.explanation: Postoji niz koraka koje možete pratiti da biste prikazali grešku. Možete ih videti u sekciji Steps to Reproduce. Pročitajte ove korake i moći ćete da odgovorite na ovo pitanje tačno.
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.

questions.text:
Tokom testiranja programa, Jessica naiđe na grešku u korisničkom interfejsu i piše sledeći izveštaj o grešci.

Software Bug Report

Date: March 28, 2025

Reported by: Jessica

Issue: Critical Bug in Latest Software Update

Description:

While reviewing the latest software update, I found a serious bug affecting the user interface. This bug causes certain elements on the screen to disappear under specific conditions, which can lead to display issues for users. The bug seems to happen randomly, but it occurs most often when switching between different views.

Severity:

This is a critical issue because it can impact the user experience. If left unresolved, it may confuse users and reduce the effectiveness of the update.

Steps to Reproduce:

  1. Open the application with the latest update.

  2. Switch between views (e.g., from the dashboard to settings).

  3. Some elements disappear on the screen.

Suggested Solution:

The issue needs to be addressed as soon as possible. A fix should be implemented to ensure that elements are displayed correctly, even when switching between views.

Next Steps:

  • Inform the rest of the team, as this may affect other parts of the project.

  • Urge the team to prioritize this bug in the next update.

Ni hatua gani za kufuata ili kuonyesha hitilafu iliyotajwa katika ripoti?

answers.answer: Fungua programu na mara moja angalia matatizo ya kuonyesha.
answers.feedback: Greška se nije desila odmah nakon otvaranja aplikacije.

answers.answer: Fungua programu na bofya haraka kwenye maoni.
answers.feedback: Ripoti haijataja kubofya kwenye maoni ili hitilafu itokee.

answers.answer: Otvori aplikaciju, prebacuj se između komentara, i pogledaj nestajuće elemente.

challenge.title: Vežba 84
